description: You are a media buyer at an advertising agency. Process the master promotional video at /home/ga/Videos/client_master_promo.mp4 into three deliverables for legacy Digital Out-Of-Home (DOOH) networks, ensuring all outputs contain no audio. Save the following to /home/ga/Videos/dooh_delivery/: highway_board.avi (MPEG-4 video codec, 800x400 stretched, 15 fps), subway_screen.mpg (MPEG-2 video codec, 1024x768 stretched), and stadium_ribbon.mp4 (H.264 video codec, 1920x200 center-cropped maintaining original aspect ratio for the visible portion, 30 fps). Extract a frame snapshot at exactly the 00:00:05 mark from each deliverable to /home/ga/Videos/dooh_delivery/proofs/ as highway_proof.png, subway_proof.png, and stadium_proof.png. Generate a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/dooh_manifest.json containing the campaign 'DOOH-Q3-PROMO', source_file 'client_master_promo.mp4', and a 'deliverables' array of objects specifying the target, filename, codec, resolution, and 'has_audio' (set to false) for each output.
